home.heroSubtitle: Our AI analyzes your resume, identifies weaknesses, and provides actionable suggestions to help you land your dream job.
home.keyFeaturesSubtitle: Our cutting-edge AI technology analyzes every aspect of your resume to help you stand out from the competition.
home.aiPoweredDesc: Our advanced AI scans your resume and provides detailed feedback on content, structure, and formatting.
home.atsDesc: Ensure your resume gets past Applicant Tracking Systems with our specialized optimization tools.
home.actionableDesc: Receive specific, step-by-step recommendations to strengthen your resume and increase interview chances.
home.threeStepsSubtitle: Our streamlined process makes it easy to improve your resume and land more interviews.
home.step1Desc: Simply upload your current resume in any format. Our system accepts PDF, DOCX, and more.
home.step2Desc: Our AI engine scans your resume, identifies strengths and weaknesses, and generates insights.
home.step3Desc: Follow our actionable recommendations, download your improved resume, and apply with confidence.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professionals who have already improved their resumes and landed their dream jobs.

analyze.title: Resume
analyze.subtitle: Upload your resume and job description to get AI-powered insights and recommendations
analyze.pasteJobDesc: Paste the job description you want to match your CV against.
analyze.interviewPrepNote: Questions are recommended based on the job description and may appear in interviews.
analyze.errorUploadAndJob: Please upload a resume and provide a job description.
analyze.errorFileType: Only PDF and DOCX are allowed.

footer.tagline: CVSmart uses advanced artificial intelligence to analyze resumes and provide actionable insights to help job seekers land more interviews.
